prose.title: 68v mos
prose.body: The 68V MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is in the U.S. Army Veterinary Corps. Soldiers in this MOS are responsible for providing veterinary care to military working dogs, government-owned animals, and pets owned by military families. They assist in maintaining animal health, provide surgical and dental care, and oversee preventative medicine programs for animals. They also provide education and guidance to pet owners on topics such as nutrition, training, and overall animal care. Additionally, they may assist in responding to public health emergencies and conduct inspections to ensure compliance with animal health and welfare regulations.
